series_metadata.series_title: Insufficient and/or Ineligible Title Assistance Requests
series_metadata.series_description: This record series may include, but is not limited to, customer requests and inquiries that do not end up resulting in the issuance or correction of a vehicle title for reasons which may include insufficient documentation/evidence provided, situations not requiring or qualifying for our agency’s assistance, etc …

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) months verification of imaged documents in BMV SharePoint Portal ; Electronic: in BMV SharePoint Portal six (6) months final (image) verification date
